blended.narrative: Winter Park is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,017 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 9" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
